ModMetaData.name: Tile Biome Editor
ModMetaData.author: jamalone
ModMetaData.description:
Adds a "Change biome..." button to any selected world tile. Pick a tile on the planet (during landing-site selection or on the in-game world map), choose a biome, and the tile is repainted to match.
Change a tile BEFORE its map is generated: the new biome drives map generation only for maps created afterward. It does not rewrite a map that already exists.
Landforms (peninsulas, islands, etc.) and tile names are independent of the biome, so a desert peninsula re-biomed to forest stays a peninsula.
Requires Harmony.
